calendar.matters:
Petition To Amend Trust Due To Scriveners Error, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, And Declarations Of Victoria S. Bahnasy And Diane Green In
Off Calendar Jul-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mary Sancimino appearing via zoom for Victoria Bahnasy and Diane Green (Co-trustee).

Discussion was held regarding any potential heirs, that Dina Barauskas was an heir and the two grandchildren. Petition to amend trust due to scrivener's error etc., is taken under submission with the intent to grant. Order to appear/order to show cause is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Chavez. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Off Calendar

Petition To Amend Trust Due To Scriveners Error, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, And Declarations Of Victoria S. Bahnasy And Diane Green In
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Continued To Jul-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Mary Sancimino (attorney) to appear on July 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear, pursuant to CCP 128. Petition to amend trust due to Scrivener's error is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
